villes-imperiales-desert-10-jours.title: Imperial Cities & Desert — 10 Days
villes-imperiales-desert-10-jours.description: The classic Morocco in 10 days: Casablanca, Rabat, Meknes, Volubilis, Fes, Sahara, luxury camp, Todra, kasbahs and Marrakech — full board.
highlights: Todra Gorges, Rose Valley, Ait Ben Haddou
Marrakech: Majorelle, medina and Jemaa el-Fnaa

itinerary.title: Casablanca / Rabat (90 km)
itinerary.text: Arrival in Casablanca. Panoramic tour: United Nations, Mohammed V, Anfa, Ain Diab corniche, Hassan II Mosque (ext.), Habbous. Rabat. Dinner and overnight. (D/B)

itinerary.title: Rabat / Meknes / Volubilis / Fes (226 km)
itinerary.text: Rabat: Hassan Tower, Mohammed V Mausoleum, Mechouar, Royal Palace, Oudayas Kasbah, Chellah. Meknes: El Hedim, Bab Mansour, Moulay Ismail granaries. Volubilis (UNESCO), Moulay Idriss. Fes. (B/L/D)

itinerary.title: Fes
itinerary.text: UNESCO medina: Fes El Bali, Bab Boujloud, Chouara tanneries, Nejjarine, Attarine, Al Quaraouiyine. Palace lunch. Royal Palace, Merinid tombs, pottery. (B/L/D)

itinerary.title: Fes / Merzouga (464 km)
itinerary.text: Via Ifrane, Azrou, Midelt, Errachidia, Tafilalet palm grove, Ziz Valley, Talghemt pass (1907 m). Erg Chebbi. (B/L/D)

itinerary.title: Merzouga / Luxury Camp
itinerary.text: 4×4 Erg Chebbi, nomad villages, gnawa music. Camel ride at sunset. Luxury camp overnight. (B/L/D)

itinerary.title: Camp / Todra / Dades (270 km)
itinerary.text: Sunrise. Todra Gorges (300 m), palm grove. Dades Valley. (B/L/D)

itinerary.title: Dades / Marrakech (324 km)
itinerary.text: Rose Valley, Ouarzazate, Taourirt Kasbah, Ait Ben Haddou (UNESCO), Tizi n'Tichka pass (2260 m). Marrakech. (B/L/D)

itinerary.title: Marrakech
itinerary.text: Majorelle, Menara, ramparts. Koutoubia, Bahia, Mellah, UNESCO medina, Secret Garden, Jemaa el-Fnaa. (B/L/D)

itinerary.title: Marrakech
itinerary.text: Free day or optional excursions. (B/L/D)

itinerary.title: Marrakech / Casablanca
itinerary.text: Transfer to Marrakech or Casablanca airport. End of tour. (B)

grand-circuit-maroc-12-jours.title: Grand Morocco Tour — 12 Days
grand-circuit-maroc-12-jours.description: Casablanca to Agadir: Chefchaouen, Fes, Sahara, kasbahs, Marrakech, Essaouira and all-inclusive Iberostar stay.
highlights: Sahara, camp, Todra, Ait Ben Haddou

itinerary.title: Casablanca
itinerary.text: Welcome, Hassan II, panoramic tour. Idou Anfa Hotel.

itinerary.title: Casablanca / Rabat
itinerary.text: Royal Palace, Chellah, Hassan Tower, Oudayas Kasbah. Riad Zyo.

itinerary.title: Rabat / Chefchaouen
itinerary.text: Blue city of the Rif. Riad Hicham.

itinerary.title: Chefchaouen / Fes
itinerary.text: Volubilis, Meknes. Riad Dilar.

itinerary.title: Fes
itinerary.text: UNESCO medina, tanneries, Bab Boujloud. Riad Dilar.

itinerary.title: Fes / Merzouga
itinerary.text: Ifrane, Ziz, Erg Chebbi. Luxury camp.

itinerary.title: Merzouga
itinerary.text: 4×4, camels. Auberge du Sud.

itinerary.title: Merzouga / Ouarzazate
itinerary.text: Todra Gorges. Dar Chamaa.

itinerary.title: Ouarzazate / Marrakech
itinerary.text: Ait Ben Haddou, Tizi n'Tichka. Kech Boutique.

itinerary.title: Marrakech
itinerary.text: Majorelle, medina, Dar Essalam. Kech Boutique.

itinerary.title: Marrakech / Essaouira
itinerary.text: Argan, Skala, medina. Côté Océan Mogador.

itinerary.title: Essaouira / Agadir
itinerary.text: Kasbah Oufella. Iberostar Founty Beach (B/AI).

activities.title: Kasbahs & Marrakech
activities.description: Ait Ben Haddou and ochre city.
